name: checkly
description: Read Checkly checks, check results, and current statuses

envVars.name: CHECKLY_ACCOUNT_ID
envVars.description: Checkly account ID (sent as the X-Checkly-Account header)

tools.name: List Checks
tools.description: List API and browser checks in the account

historicalSummary.omitted: request/script definitions and alert channel settings

tools.name: List Check Results
tools.description: List raw results for a check within a time window (from/to must be at most 6 hours apart)

from.description: Window start as a UNIX timestamp (seconds)

to.description: Window end as a UNIX timestamp (seconds); at most 6 hours after 'from'

resultType.description: Result type filter: ALL, FINAL, or ATTEMPT

tools.name: List Check Statuses
tools.description: Get the current status of every check in the account

tools.name: Get Check Status
tools.description: Get the current status of a single check

prompts.title: Failing checks
prompts.prompt: List my Checkly check statuses and tell me which checks are currently failing or degraded.

prompts.title: Recent failures
prompts.prompt: Get the results with failures for my main Checkly check over the last 6 hours and summarize the errors.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Checkly API Setup

steps.title: Sign up for Checkly
steps.description: Create a free account at https://app.checklyhq.com (the free Hobby plan includes API access) and create at least one check.

steps.title: Create an API key
steps.description: Go to User Settings → API keys (https://app.checklyhq.com/settings/user/api-keys), create a key, and add it to your .env as CHECKLY_API_KEY.

steps.title: Copy your account ID
steps.description: Find the account ID under Account Settings → General and add it as CHECKLY_ACCOUNT_ID.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run List Checks, then List Check Statuses.

notes: Every request needs both 'Authorization: Bearer <api key>' and the 'X-Checkly-Account: <account id>' header
Raw check results are kept for 30 days, and a results query window (from/to) may span at most 6 hours
Check results use the newer /v2 path; checks and statuses use /v1
